content:
🌟 Introducing Our May and June 2026 Interns! 🌟

We are delighted to welcome and acknowledge the talented cohort of legal interns who joined DAAS LEGAL during May and June, 2026. Each of them brought with them fresh perspectives, strong analytical abilities, and a genuine enthusiasm for legal research and advocacy.

During the course of their internship, they actively contributed to ongoing matters, assisted in legal research, and gained valuable exposure to practical aspects of the profession. Their dedication, curiosity, and professionalism have truly added value to our team.

Meet our May and June Interns:

1. Mahika Raj
2. Chalantika De
3. Purbashree Deka 
4. Anushka De 
5. Maahita Shrivastava
6. Samyamoy Biswas

We are proud to have been a part of their professional journey and wish them continued success in their future legal careers.

For internship or career opportunities, feel free to reach out to us at:
📩 contact@daaslegal.co.in

#DAASLEGAL #LegalInternship #FutureLawyers #LegalResearch #InternshipProgram #ProfessionalGrowth #LawFirmLife #LegalCareer #Teamwork #LearningExperience
comment: Intern cohorts like this work best when there’s a structured handover of research memos into a reusable knowledge base; otherwise most value is lost post-internship.
